title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Voylla - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Voylla - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Voylla in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Voylla:
Voylla is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
